title: feat(gptimage-2): add gpt-image-2 via Azure eastus2
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Fresh pixels from gptimage-2
gist.blurb: We just wired up gptimage-2 to the image API. Grab your digital brushes and start prompting—it's available right now using your standard Pollen balance.
gist.summary: Added OpenAI's gptimage-2 model to the image generation API, routed efficiently through our Azure infrastructure.
gist.impact: Developers and creators can now generate images using the new `gptimage-2` model with zero price markup.
gist.visual_concept: A new image model means new art capabilities. Depict Polly the bee as an artist (wearing a beret) collaborating with the Monitor Robot on a glowing digital canvas, symbolizing the new gptimage-2 model.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting on a glowing digital canvas alongside a chunky monitor-head robot. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'GPTIMAGE-2'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting on a glowing digital canvas alongside a chunky monitor-head robot. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'GPTIMAGE-2'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
